verse_text: and that He might make known the riches of His glory on the vessels of mercy, which He had prepared beforehand for glory,

pericope.title: God Is Just in His Choice

links.context: His own vessel speaks of the entire human being ([[ROM.9:20]]-23; [[2CO.4:7]]; [[2TI.2:20]], 21)--probably one's own self, perhaps one's wife (or husband). In either case one's vessel must be possessed with purity, self-control, and chastity.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
